headline: ZTS Wins European Commission Approval for New Poultry Disease Vaccine
summary: Zoetis wins EU approval for a single-dose poultry vaccine against Newcastle and Marek's diseases, expanding its vaccine portfolio and flock protection options.

headline: Stryker: Medtech On Sale, Benefiting From Industry Growth
